overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a rainy industrial harbor district in a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2). The player moves along wooden docks and train tracks past brick warehouses, cargo containers, and moored ships under an overcast, stormy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial harbor approach with grassy embankment

events.description: approaching and entering wooden covered dock structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a grassy path toward a wooden dock area, passing a caution sign

entered.detail: large brick factory building with two tall smokestacks and arched windows
long wooden dock warehouse with sloped roof and open sides
wooden utility poles with multiple cross-arms and wires
weathered wooden plank fence along the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy industrial harbor scene with a large brick factory building dominating the background. The camera moves forward along a grassy embankment toward a wooden covered dock structure, passing telegraph poles and wooden fencing.

events.description: exiting covered dock structure into open waterfront area

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered dock roof, passing stacks of lumber and cargo

entered.detail: piles of wooden planks and beams stacked on the dock platform
wooden crates and barrels stacked along the right side
tall-masted sailing vessel moored in the harbor distance

segments.scene_description: Moving under the shelter of a wooden dock roof, the scene becomes darker and more enclosed. The camera passes stacks of lumber and cargo containers while the harbor with distant sailing ships becomes visible to the left. The wooden planks of the dock create a rhythmic pattern underfoot.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront dock with harbor view

events.description: transitioning from wooden dock to railway tracks along the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the open waterfront, observing ships in the harbor and passing cargo containers

entered.detail: leafless deciduous trees silhouetted against the cloudy sky
curving railway tracks running parallel to the waterfront

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered dock into the open air, the full harbor view reveals misty water with anchored ships. The camera moves along the waterfront where wooden decking gives way to railway tracks, passing leafless trees and cargo containers while telegraph poles line the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: railway yard approach with multiple tracks

events.description: approaching train yard with stationary rail cars visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the railway tracks toward a train yard, passing wooden station buildings

entered.detail: weathered wooden railway station with green trim and multiple towers
red wooden boxcar sitting on a siding track
large covered train shed with peaked roof at the end of the tracks

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a railway yard with multiple converging tracks. The camera moves forward past a wooden station building with distinctive green trim and a red boxcar on the left, heading toward a large covered train shed in the distance.

events.description: entering the dark interior of the train shed, light drops significantly

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered train shed, passing stationary rail cars on either side

entered.detail: blue wooden boxcar with open door on the left track
high pitched roof with exposed wooden trusses and metal supports

segments.scene_description: Entering the cavernous train shed, the lighting drops dramatically as the roof blocks the stormy sky. The camera moves between stationary rail cars—including a blue boxcar on the left and the red car now closer—under the shelter of the massive wooden and metal truss structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open rainy embankment into a sheltered industrial dock before emerging back into the expansive harbor. It begins by moving forward past telegraph poles and wooden fencing toward a large brick factory building. As the camera passes under the roof of a wooden dock, the environment becomes darker and more enclosed, shifting focus to stacks of lumber and cargo containers while sailing ships appear in the distance to the left. The scene then opens back into the misty air as the camera leaves the shelter, revealing anchored ships on the water. Finally, the wooden decking gives way to railway tracks that lead past leafless trees and utility poles along the waterfront.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, rainy railway yard into the dim interior of a massive train shed. It begins by moving forward through a network of converging tracks, passing a wooden station building with green trim and a red boxcar. As the camera advances toward the distance, the open stormy sky is suddenly eclipsed by the roof of a cavernous structure. The scene then shifts into a dramatic drop in lighting as the camera glides beneath a heavy wooden and metal truss system. Finally, the movement continues deep into the shelter, weaving between stationary blue and red rail cars in the shadows of the shed.
